items.title: Forget LLMs: Buy these 3 AI "Pick and Shovel" Plays Instead
items.description: During the proverbial (and actual) gold rush, the most consistent fortunes are made by those selling the "picks and shovels." While the LLM wars between tech giants continue to dominate the headlines, the real staying power and predictability lie in the AI infrastructure stocks.

items.title: Stock Market Today, Jan. 12: Iren Jumps on Bernstein Naming It Top AI Pick After Microsoft Contract Win
items.description: On Jan. 12, 2026, a Bitcoin-linked data center operator’s AI pivot and Microsoft deal put its growth strategy under the spotlight.

items.title: Stock Market Today: Dow, S&P 500 Close At Highs; Alphabet Hits $4 Trillion Mark (Live Coverage)
items.description: Nasdaq composite outperforms the Dow and the S&P 500. Alphabet crosses above $4 trillion market cap.

items.title: Trump says Microsoft will make changes to ensure consumers don't pay for power used in AI buildout
items.description: President Trump said in a social media post that Microsoft will "make major changes beginning this week" to make sure Americans don't see rising energy costs.

items.title: Apple calls on Google to help smarten up Siri and bring other AI features to the iPhone
items.description: Apple will rely on Google to help finish its efforts to smarten up its virtual assistant Siri and bring other artificial intelligence features to the iPhone as the trendsetting company plays catch up in technology's latest craze.  The deal allowing Apple to tap into Google's AI technology was disclosed Monday in a joint statement from the Silicon Valley powerhouses.  The partnership will draw upon Google's Gemini technology to customize a suite of AI features dubbed “Apple Intelligence” on the iPhone and other products.
